title: HEALTH SERVICES - 211info
text: SPRAY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER SPRAY HEALTH SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a wide range of primary and preventive health care services to the community. Services may include: general medical exams, women's annual exam, STD screening and treatment, pediatric care, vaccinations, mental health evaluations and counseling services, and drug and alcohol assessment. 211 Pine Street Spray, OR 97874 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Wednesday 9:30am-2pm, Friday 2pm-4pm (541) 468-2211 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 468-2211 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for information FEES: Accepts Medicare, Medicaid (OHP), and most private insurance. Sliding-fee payment scale and payment plans available to individuals with high deductibles or no insurance. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Household income information for those applying for the sliding scale fee option. AREA SERVED: Wheeler County SITE HOURS: Spray is only open on Wednesday mornings and Friday afternoons. Services: Childhood Immunization Community Clinics Family Counseling General Medical Care Individual Counseling Pap Tests Sexually Transmitted Infection Screening Sexually Transmitted Infection Treatment Vaccine Information Well Baby Care Other Services Offered At This Location: SPECIALTY MEDICINE - DENTAL SERVICES If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. SPRAY COMMUNITY HEALTH CENTER SPRAY
